mapper.select: SELECT layer_id AS "layerId", project_id AS "projectId", parent_layer_id AS "parentLayerId", layer_name AS "layerName", color, visible, element_ids AS "elementIds", sort_order AS "sortOrder" FROM bim_layer WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bim_layer (layer_id, project_id, parent_layer_id, layer_name, color, visible, element_ids, sort_order) VALUES (#{layerId}, #{projectId}, #{parentLayerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{layerName}, #{color}, #{visible}, #{elementIds}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE bim_layer SET layer_name = #{layerName}, color = #{color}, visible = #{visible}, element_ids = #{elementIds}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE layer_id = #{layerId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bim_layer (layer_id, project_id, parent_layer_id, layer_name, color, visible, element_ids, sort_order) VALUES
(#{l.layerId}, #{l.projectId}, #{l.parentLayerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{l.layerName}, #{l.color}, #{l.visible}, #{l.elementIds}, #{l.sortOrder})
ON CONFLICT (layer_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT element_id AS "elementId", project_id AS "projectId", color FROM bim_element_color WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bim_element_color (element_id, project_id, color) VALUES (#{elementId}, #{projectId}, #{color}) ON CONFLICT (element_id) DO UPDATE SET color = EXCLUDED.color
mapper.select: SELECT line_id AS "lineId", project_id AS "projectId", start_x AS "startX", start_y AS "startY", start_z AS "startZ", end_x AS "endX", end_y AS "endY", end_z AS "endZ", color, line_width AS "lineWidth", points_json AS "pointsJson", closed, shape_height AS "shapeHeight", line_type AS "lineType" FROM bim_line WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bim_line (line_id, project_id, start_x, start_y, start_z, end_x, end_y, end_z, color, line_width, points_json, closed, shape_height, line_type) VALUES (#{lineId}, #{projectId}, #{startX}, #{startY}, #{startZ}, #{endX}, #{endY}, #{endZ}, #{color}, #{lineWidth}, #{pointsJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{closed}, #{shapeHeight}, #{lineType,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

INSERT INTO bim_line (line_id, project_id, start_x, start_y, start_z, end_x, end_y, end_z, color, line_width, points_json, closed, shape_height, line_type) VALUES
(#{l.lineId}, #{l.projectId}, #{l.startX}, #{l.startY}, #{l.startZ}, #{l.endX}, #{l.endY}, #{l.endZ}, #{l.color}, #{l.lineWidth}, #{l.pointsJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{l.closed}, #{l.shapeHeight}, #{l.lineType,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE bim_line SET start_x = #{startX}, start_y = #{startY}, start_z = #{startZ}, end_x = #{endX}, end_y = #{endY}, end_z = #{endZ}, color = #{color}, line_width = #{lineWidth}, points_json = #{pointsJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, closed = #{closed}, shape_height = #{shapeHeight}, line_type = #{lineType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE line_id = #{lineId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bim_project (project_id, project_name, structure_type, geo_latitude, geo_longitude, geo_elevation, ifc_offset_x, ifc_offset_y, ifc_offset_z, ifc_scale) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{projectName}, #{structureType}, #{geoLatitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{geoLongitude,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{geoElevation,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{ifcOffsetX,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{ifcOffsetY,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{ifcOffsetZ,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{ifcScale,jdbcType=DOUBLE}) ON CONFLICT (project_id) DO UPDATE SET geo_latitude = EXCLUDED.geo_latitude, geo_longitude = EXCLUDED.geo_longitude, geo_elevation = EXCLUDED.geo_elevation, ifc_offset_x = EXCLUDED.ifc_offset_x, ifc_offset_y = EXCLUDED.ifc_offset_y, ifc_offset_z = EXCLUDED.ifc_offset_z, ifc_scale = EXCLUDED.ifc_scale
mapper.select: SELECT project_id AS "projectId", project_name AS "projectName", structure_type AS "structureType", span_count AS "spanCount", geo_latitude AS "geoLatitude", geo_longitude AS "geoLongitude", geo_elevation AS "geoElevation", ifc_offset_x AS "ifcOffsetX", ifc_offset_y AS "ifcOffsetY", ifc_offset_z AS "ifcOffsetZ", ifc_scale AS "ifcScale", storage_key AS "storageKey", original_filename AS "originalFilename", uploaded_at AS "uploadedAt" FROM bim_project ORDER BY project_name ASC

SELECT project_id AS "projectId", project_name AS "projectName", structure_type AS "structureType", span_count AS "spanCount", geo_latitude AS "geoLatitude", geo_longitude AS "geoLongitude", geo_elevation AS "geoElevation", ifc_offset_x AS "ifcOffsetX", ifc_offset_y AS "ifcOffsetY", ifc_offset_z AS "ifcOffsetZ", ifc_scale AS "ifcScale", storage_key AS "storageKey", original_filename AS "originalFilename", uploaded_at AS "uploadedAt" FROM bim_project WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.update: UPDATE bim_project SET storage_key = #{storageKey}, original_filename = #{originalFilename}, uploaded_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.select: SELECT element_type AS "elementType", COUNT(*) AS "elementCount" FROM bim_element WHERE project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY element_type ORDER BY 2 DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bim_element (element_id, project_id, element_type, material, position_x, position_y, position_z, size_x, size_y, size_z, rotation_x, rotation_y, rotation_z, ifc_world_x, ifc_world_y, ifc_world_z, global_id, ifc_name, storey, building) VALUES
(#{e.elementId}, #{e.projectId}, #{e.elementType}, #{e.material,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e.positionX,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{e.positionY,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{e.positionZ,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{e.sizeX,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{e.sizeY,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{e.sizeZ,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{e.rotationX,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{e.rotationY,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{e.rotationZ,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{e.ifcWorldX,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{e.ifcWorldY,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{e.ifcWorldZ,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{e.globalId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e.ifcName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e.storey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e.building,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
ON CONFLICT (element_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT element_id AS "elementId", element_type AS "elementType", material, position_x AS "positionX", position_y AS "positionY", position_z AS "positionZ", size_x AS "sizeX", size_y AS "sizeY", size_z AS "sizeZ", rotation_x AS "rotationX", rotation_y AS "rotationY", rotation_z AS "rotationZ", ifc_world_x AS "ifcWorldX", ifc_world_y AS "ifcWorldY", ifc_world_z AS "ifcWorldZ", global_id AS "globalId", ifc_name AS "ifcName", storey, building FROM bim_element WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY element_type, element_id

SELECT storey_id AS "storeyId", project_id AS "projectId", storey_name AS "storeyName", elevation, building, sort_order AS "sortOrder" FROM bim_storey WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY building ASC NULLS LAST, sort_order ASC, elevation ASC NULLS LAST
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bim_storey (storey_id, project_id, storey_name, elevation, building, sort_order) VALUES
(#{s.storeyId}, #{s.projectId}, #{s.storeyName}, #{s.elevation,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{s.building,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{s.sortOrder})
ON CONFLICT (storey_id) DO UPDATE SET storey_name = EXCLUDED.storey_name, elevation = EXCLUDED.elevation, building = EXCLUDED.building, sort_order = EXCLUDED.sort_order
mapper.select: SELECT wbs_id AS "wbsId", project_id AS "projectId", parent_wbs_id AS "parentWbsId", wbs_code AS "wbsCode", wbs_name AS "wbsName", node_type AS "nodeType", building, storey, element_type AS "elementType", element_count AS "elementCount", progress, sort_order AS "sortOrder", quantity, unit, formula, reason, standard FROM bim_wbs_node WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, wbs_id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bim_wbs_node (wbs_id, project_id, parent_wbs_id, wbs_code, wbs_name, node_type, building, storey, element_type, element_count, progress, sort_order, quantity, unit, formula, reason, standard) VALUES
(#{n.wbsId}, #{n.projectId}, #{n.parentWbsId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{n.wbsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{n.wbsName}, #{n.nodeType}, #{n.building,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{n.storey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{n.elementType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{n.elementCount}, #{n.progress}, #{n.sortOrder}, #{n.quantity,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{n.unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{n.formula,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{n.reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{n.standard,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
ON CONFLICT (wbs_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE bim_wbs_node SET progress = #{progress}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE wbs_id = #{wbsId}
mapper.select: SELECT element_id AS "elementId", wbs_id AS "wbsId", project_id AS "projectId" FROM bim_element_wbs WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bim_element_wbs (element_id, wbs_id, project_id) VALUES
(#{m.elementId}, #{m.wbsId}, #{m.projectId})
ON CONFLICT (element_id, wbs_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT element_id FROM bim_element_wbs WHERE wbs_id = #{wbsId}
SELECT wbs_id FROM bim_element_wbs WHERE element_id = #{elementId} LIMIT 1
